# Whatapp v0.3.0

## Highlights

- Added a reusable outbound WhatsApp delivery layer with persistent message logging.
- Added master-data recipient resolution across HR, CRM, buying, and contact records.
- Added WhatsApp notifications for HRMS leave workflows and ERPNext issue workflows.
- Added direct `Send WhatsApp` actions on `Employee`, `Customer`, `Supplier`, `Lead`, and `Contact` forms.
- Tightened manual send permissions to follow Frappe document access.

## Validation

- `./env/bin/pip check`
- `bench --site srs.localhost run-tests --app whatapp --module whatapp.tests.test_recipient_resolver`
- `bench --site srs.localhost run-tests --app whatapp --module whatapp.tests.test_issue_events`

## Upgrade notes

- Run `bench --site <site> migrate` after pulling the release to create the new `Whatapp Message Log` DocType.
- Run `bench --site <site> clear-cache` so the new desk form actions load immediately.
